data.title: Self love
data.content: I love this so much. It has helped me become a better person and has helped me with anxiety and emotional support and I’m just so happy that I got it.
data.author: So much helpful advice

data.title: Amazinggggg

data.author: Breelivesfreeapps

data.title: A powerful daily affirmation app
data.content:
This app has been phenomenal for helping me embrace myself, grow my gratitude and stay focused on my goals. I look forward to saying my affirmations every day because of it. The affirmation categories are extensive and the wallpaper themes are beautiful.

My only complaints are that the customization can feel limited with backgrounds, fonts and font colors and the app does not always sync properly between my phone and iPad on check-in days/calculations.

Overall I’m truly grateful for this app and the positive impact it has had on my mindset and daily life. ✨

I genuinely love this app back then despite some themes being locked through a paywall but this new feature defeats the use of this app.

GONE? Knowing I’m okay? I feel the best. I just wish a lot of things didn’t need you to have a membership but otherwise, THE BEST

data.title: App
data.content: Before I open this app, I was not confident about myself at all, but as I’m getting through this app, it showed me that I love myself, and I am good enough, and I think that’s exactly what I wanted to do. This app is great. You don’t have to pay for everything.Overall. There’s not a lot of ads and you don’t have to pay for every single thing. You could love yourself without spending money, and I think that is amazing.

The encouragement and themes are great, but the issues outweigh the positives. I’m not sure I’ll keep using it, paying for something i have to work for defeats the purpose.

data.title: Easy to use
data.content: Sign up was flawless and there are lots of great affirmations. The free version is simple yet effective. This is my most consistently used mental health app so far. I’ve made it to 250+ day streak
data.author: Jackson Ho.

data.title: My signs from the Universe
data.content: I never leave reviews for apps, but I literally was just thinking about how I’m genuinely grateful for this app of course, when you set an intention to connect with your angels and guides in the universe, it’ll communicate to you identify. And this app has done exactly that. This app literally sends me the craziest signs  exactly when I needed it and I always just say my angels communicate through it. It’s so much more than an affirmation app if you give it permission to be. Thank you guys for making such an amazing app and reminding me that I’m constantly connected to something greater than me.

If you value your sleep, DO NOT DOWNLOAD

In fact, as a therapist, I have encouraged my clients to give positive affirmations a chance.  I am worthy of affirming my self on my way to the best version of me.

It sounds like this is separate from the 3 day trial - but there’s no way to confirm it. I was really liking it so far too - definitely leaning toward buying it. But I will not contribute to dark or deceptive user experiences. This goes against the ethos I believe this app is trying to promote. Bummer.

data.content:
Even if you delete this app it leaves a phantom alarm. It has been driving me absolutely crazy! 

UPDATE: So basically I have a phantom alarm on my phone from your app. It goes off daily at 11:45pm I had went through every inch of my phone and think I finally found a way to stop it. I redownloaded the app and when it got to the part about alarms I hit no and no notifications etc. so far it seems to have stopped!

data.title: I don’t receive affirmation notifications
data.content: I’m very disappointed with this app. The main reason I purchased it was to receive life affirmations throughout the day via phone notifications. Unfortunately, after the first day or two, the affirmations stopped completely. The only notification I now receive is a reminder to “practice,” which isn’t something I’m interested in. It’s frustrating that there doesn’t seem to be a clear way to contact support for assistance, and I haven’t found any helpful information addressing this issue in the help articles. Overall, this has been a very disappointing experience.

data.title: Developers can’t fix simple issue
data.content: I subscribed because this app had everything I wanted — the ability to add my own affirmations and customize the font and background of the widgets. Across several updates now the widgets simply do not work. The customization is clunky and the correct affirmations do not appear. We are not talking about a complicated app here. Loads of other affirmation apps get it right but so far I haven’t found one that also offers customized backgrounds. This looked great but they just can’t get it to work right. Don’t waste your money!
data.author: MicTheFly

data.title: Customer Service
data.content: I like the app but I was supposed to get a discount when I purchased the subscription and did not receive one and was charged full price. I’ve looked to see if there is a customer service number and can’t find one. It’s impossible to find a place to contact them and there are just a page full of Q&As that were not helpful. If you ever have a problem with this it will be extremely hard to get help fixing it.

data.title: Why the need for greed
data.content: I am so saddened to see that for the last two years my subscription was 17.99 a year and now it is 14.99 a month or 69.99 a year? WOW that is insane.
